description: AI has officially turned midnight meowing into a full-blown concert. author: longliveai
description: AI has officially turned man’s best friend into a professional dancer. Thanks to OpenAI’s Sora 2, the internet is packed with hyper-realistic clips of a dog nailing a full choreography — hitting every beat, spinning on cue, and matching the music with moves that would put half of TikTok to shame. What started as a cute idea has become a viral showcase of how far AI video generation has come. Sora 2 can now recreate lifelike animal motion, perfectly timed rhythm, and cinematic performance shots — all from a single text prompt. The result looks so real you might actually believe this dog trained with a choreographer. It’s adorable, impressive, and insanely entertaining all at once. Would you duet this dance or just hit replay? 👀💬 Join the fastest-growing AI community on TikTok @longliveai #ai #sora #dog #dance #viral #meme #aivideo #aiart #sora2 #openai #animals #choreo

description: Happy Nibsgiving 🐿️🤎.  i just wanna take a second to let you know how much i appreciate you. these past 3 months have been insane, and i’m so thankful for all the love and support you’ve given me. before i started posting on tiktok, i was honestly in a really dark place, and all of this — ALL OF YOU — completely flipped my outlook on life. it’s wild that something so little and silly can make people smile and laugh, and that i get to share that kind of joy with everyone around me. this whole journey has changed my life in the best way, and i don’t plan on stopping anytime soon. i can’t even explain how beyond thankful i am for every single one of you. 🥹 thank you.  -nibs

author: longliveai
description: AI has officially turned man’s best friend into a professional dancer. Thanks to OpenAI’s Sora 2, the internet is packed with hyper-realistic clips of a dog nailing a full choreography — hitting every beat, spinning on cue, and matching the music with moves that would put half of TikTok to shame. What started as a cute idea has become a viral showcase of how far AI video generation has come. Sora 2 can now recreate lifelike animal motion, perfectly timed rhythm, and cinematic performance shots — all from a single text prompt. The result looks so real you might actually believe this dog trained with a choreographer. It’s adorable, impressive, and insanely entertaining all at once. Would you duet this dance or just hit replay? 👀💬 Join the fastest-growing AI community on TikTok @longliveai #ai #sora #dog #dance #viral #meme #aivideo #aiart #sora2 #openai #animals #choreo
